message:
🐛 Fix feedback UI for demo/auth'd users and enhance webhook pipeline (#157)

- Fix isDemoUser() to handle missing token (show demo data instead of empty queue)
- Fix auth session recovery to fall back to demo mode on invalid/expired JWT
- Extract setDemoMode() helper to deduplicate demo user object across auth flows
- Add "Demo" badge to feedback dialog header for non-authenticated users
- Add "Closed" badge alongside "Fix Complete" for merged items
- Add ensureFeatureRequestExists() to create DB records for external GitHub issues
- Add pipelineLabels map to handle all pipeline label transitions with notifications
- Handle ai-fix-requested label to auto-track externally created issues

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
